system.description:
Whether through long practice or sheer bloodthirst, you are incredibly efficient at putting down the dead. This focus is inapplicable to non-Deadlands campaigns.

Level 1: As a Main Action, kill up to six zombies of 1 HD or less within range of your weapon. If using a gun, expend one bullet or charge per zombie. Each use of this ability in a scene after the first adds one System Strain.

Level 2: Your attack roll against zombies always counts as a natural 20. You do an additional 8 points of damage to zombies on a hit.
